rationale: Educ. Code §29.153 governs prekindergarten eligibility and program standards. It contains no reference to the homestead exemption amount or property tax values, so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: Sec. 29.153. FREE PREKINDERGARTEN FOR CERTAIN CHILDREN.
_note: No textual link between §29.153 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Indirect revenue impact on school districts is not a direct statutory conflict.
